title: How a man of God handles conflict without going cold
caption:
Most men handle conflict one of two ways: they blow up, or they go cold and distant.

A man of God does neither.

He gets honest with his own part first, before he says anything. He says the hard thing to the man's face, not the group chat. He goes first into the loss, even when he's not fully wrong. And when it's over, he doesn't disappear.

Jesus wept. He also flipped tables. A man of God needs both: the courage to say the hard thing, and the gentleness to say it for the other man's sake, not his own.

A relationship that survives a hard conversation is stronger than one that never had one.

Send this to the man you need to talk to.

#faith #christianmen #conflict #godlymen #manofgod #thevision #matthew18 #christianity #servantleadership
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
